author: y4rr
content: Decision: Use objc2-metal 0.3.2 (already in Cargo.lock transitively). Added as direct dep gated by [target.'cfg(target_os="macos")'.dependencies] so it does not introduce any new transitive deps and the WSL2 build stays clean. Alternative was metal-rs crate — rejected because objc2-metal is already present and provides idiomatic Rust bindings for the exact same Metal API surface.
